---
name: Task
about: Single issue execution template
title: "ISSUE-XXX: <short title>"
labels: [task]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

Describe the exact issue goal.

## Acceptance Criteria

List concrete pass conditions.

## Out of Scope

List what must not be changed.

## Tests

List tests/checks to run and expected outcome.

## Definition of Done

Issue is done when acceptance criteria pass, snapshot exists, and commit is created.
